Home.subtitle: Crafting world-class 2D animation, background art, and composite works for global projects.

Services.title: SERVICES DIRECTORY
Services.subtitle: From the first concept sketches to the final composite frames. Here is what we can do to bring your ideas to reality.
Services.s01Desc: Full-pipeline production from A to Z, specially optimized for high-impact VTuber music videos.
Services.s02Desc: Handling short film projects, from quick first-look teasers to mid-and-long-form ONAs.
Services.s03Desc: Our core strength. Providing high-quality, ultra-detailed backgrounds for other anime studios or game projects.
Services.s04Desc: Designing environments, characters, and world-building from the earliest sketches.
Services.s05Desc: Post-production magic. Handling lighting, explosions, filters, and seamless VFX using After Effects.
Services.s06Desc: Specializing in character sprites, CG events, and specific backgrounds for narrative-driven visual novels.
Services.s07Desc: Striking digital illustrations for light novels, book covers, and project key visuals.
Services.s08Desc: Designing commercial merchandise for fandoms: standees, keychains, T-shirts, posters...
Services.s10Desc: High-end display graphics on LED screens for mega events, concerts, and grand stages.
Services.s11Desc: Short videos and optimized animations for social media advertising campaigns.

Pipeline.title: PRODUCTION PIPELINE
Pipeline.subtitle: There is no magic here. Only sweat, tears, and a rigorous Japanese-standard production pipeline.
Pipeline.step01Desc: Everything starts from scratch. Outlining the worldview, character design, and drawing storyboards to define the pacing and camera angles of the entire film.
Pipeline.step02Desc: The storyboard is converted into a rough animation (Animatic/V-board) to check the pacing, camera work, and emotion of each scene. This is a crucial step to detect flaws before full production.
Pipeline.step03Desc: Key animators start hand-drawing the main frames. This step dictates the acting, emotion, and impact of action sequences.
Pipeline.step04Desc: Smooth clean-up and in-between frames (Douga) to create seamless movement, followed by coloring based on the approved Color Setting.
Pipeline.step05Desc: In parallel with animation, the BG team paints highly detailed backgrounds, creating a vibrant world for characters to interact in.
Pipeline.step06Desc: Compositing characters onto backgrounds, applying lighting, shadows, filters, and bombarding the scene with VFX (explosions, magic, smoke) using After Effects.

About.title: ABOUT US
About.visionDesc1: Based in Ho Chi Minh City, Ren Animation Studio specializes in high-quality 2D anime production. From intricate background painting and digital illustration to advanced compositing (Satsuei), we bring compelling narratives to life.
About.visionDesc2: Beyond production, we are dedicated to nurturing the next generation of artists through our educational initiative, Background Anime Class.
About.inHouseDesc: At the heart of Ren Animation Studio is a dynamic blend of our top-performing alumni and a seasoned network of freelance experts. Our unified team of Lead Animators, Background Artists, and Concept Artists ensures every frame meets our high standards of artistic integrity.
